Data Arrangement

Upload any data file — or a photo/screenshot of a table — SARVARC Workspace reads it: tabular data gets clean, precisely structured tables with headers auto-detected (even past title rows, grouped column headers, or currency/percent formatting); full written content gets analysed and arranged topic by topic, so nothing comes out as a messy pile of lines. Then work it like a spreadsheet, type =SUM(A1:A5), =B2*C2, =CONVERT(A2,"km","mi"), or =CURRENCY(A2,"USD","INR") straight into a cell.

Drop your file here

or click to browse files
Word, PDF, CSV, Excel, TSV, TXT, JSON, or a photo/screenshot of a table: SARVARC looks for a table, and arranges the content either way

DOCX PDF XLSX CSV TSV TXT JSON PNG/JPG
Choose File(s)
or

Saved Sessions

Saved on this device only — there's no account or server involved, and nothing is tracked by IP. A session bundles your current Workspace document, tables, forms, charts and redaction batches under one name, so you can pick up right where you left off. It stays saved until you delete it below.

Private by design
On-device only
No account needed

Privacy Redaction

Upload a scanned document or photo of an ID/form — select several at once to redact a whole batch in one session. SARVARC will OCR each one, detect names, addresses, bank details, government IDs, license numbers and signatures, and let you review before permanently blacking them out — all in your browser, nothing is uploaded anywhere.

Upload a PDF or image to redact

Drag & drop one or more files here, or click to browse. ID cards, bank statements, forms, and scanned letters all work — select multiple to process them as a batch.

Everything happens on your device — the file is never uploaded to a server.
Batch
1 / 1
100%

Detected Items

0 found across this document
No sensitive info detected yet. Click "Scan for Sensitive Info" to begin.
Solid black/white is the most secure mask. Blur and pixelate can sometimes be reversed with specialist tools, use them only when a lighter touch is fine.

Word Document
Editable .docx table
Image (PNG)
One PNG per page, zipped if more than one
Each selected page is rendered pixel-exact, just like the PDF export, and saved as a PNG. Pick more than one page and they'll come down together as a single ZIP.
Pulls from any Insert Table boxes and Add Text boxes on the page, plus the PDF's real text (if any), and groups it into rows & columns automatically. Pages with none of that, pure image/scan pages, get skipped and you'll be told how many.
The page stays one flat layer, but any Add Text boxes are written back in as real PDF text, not pixels, so they stay selectable, searchable, and editable in Acrobat or any PDF editor.
Normal Word export
Header/logo band embedded exactly as it looks on the page
Logo detected, extract and remove background
Crops the letterhead mark and makes its background transparent
